current_life_events: Today I attended a 3-hour pharmacology lecture, then spent the evening reviewing notes while trying to process the news of my best friend’s death. I missed a few hours of sleep and feel drained.
mental_state: Heavy with grief yet anxious about exams, feeling torn between mourning and meeting deadlines.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The combination of a recent loss and a demanding coursework schedule has made the stress of exams and the lack of rest feel immediate and urgent, prompting the user to seek support today.
